hero.description: From the Pantanal to the Pacific — the greatest continental integration in South America, uniting cultures, peoples and markets across 3,500 km of living history.

instagram.title: Now follow the route on Instagram

cards.unescoDesc: Cultural and natural heritage internationally recognized along the corridor

cities.title: Route Cities
cities.subtitle: Strategic development points
cities.sectionDescription: From the Pantanal to the Pacific — Brazil, Paraguay, Argentina and Chile. Each stop on the route carries a story the world doesn't know yet.
cities.exploreHint: Click on a country to explore the cities
cities.scrollHint: ↓ scroll to see the full book

newsletter.title: Stay Updated
newsletter.description: Receive the latest news about investments and opportunities on the Bioceanic Route.

footer.description: The corridor connecting the Atlantic to the Pacific — integrating Brazil, Paraguay, Argentina and Chile into a single destination.

colabo.description: Local journalists, historians, photographers and storytellers — send articles, old photos or stories and see your voice reach the four countries of the route.

apoie.description: The greatest integration corridor in South America already has a date. The 2026 window is open — your name is missing from it.
